title: UoS HR and UCU RAG
content:
- Ingest all the HR documents
- Ingest the employment law legal black bood
- Ingest all [[UCU]] training material and documents nationally and in the branch
- Convert to markdown across the board
- Build a word cloud across the corpus and strip back to the essentials for the GraphRAG
- Transfer into the RAGflow system
- Build an HR agent flow
- Build a UCU rep flow
- Build an employee flow
- Test
- Change the repeat
